title: wedelia grandiflora
intro: Wedelia grandiflora, also known as Flor de Muerto, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include treating fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an insect repellent. Its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be obtained by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant.
